subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden and My leaf! Hearken thou unto My most sweet call which hath been raised from the Prison of 'Akká: Verily, there is no God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی و یا ورقتی ان استمعی ندائی الاحلی الذی ارتفع فی سجن عکاء انه لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consolation and comfort
